questions.question: If an organization faces a situation where a data breach has occurred, which phase of the incident response framework would be most critical for preventing further damage and regaining control, and what actions would be taken?

feedback: You scored 0 out of 10 on this incident response quiz, indicating a foundational understanding is still developing. While no sections were identified as strong, this quiz has clearly highlighted the core areas needing your attention. Specifically, understanding the importance and creation of an incident response plan, as well as the phases within common frameworks, requires further focus. To improve, I recommend reviewing the basic definitions and purposes of incident response plans and then mapping these concepts to the standard phases like preparation, identification, containment, eradication, and recovery. Building a solid understanding of these fundamentals will set you up for success in future assessments.
